scripts.build: mkdir -p www && xcopy /E /I /Y assets www\assets & copy index.html www\index.html & copy styles.css www\styles.css & copy app.js www\app.js & copy manifest.webmanifest www\manifest.webmanifest & copy service-worker.js www\service-worker.js
scripts.copy:web: mkdir -p www && xcopy /E /I /Y assets www\assets & copy index.html www\index.html & copy styles.css www\styles.css & copy app.js www\app.js & copy manifest.webmanifest www\manifest.webmanifest & copy service-worker.js www\service-worker.js
scripts.cap:sync: npm run copy:web && npx cap sync
scripts.android: npm run copy:web && npx cap open android
scripts.ios: npm run copy:web && npx cap open ios
